title: Free Social Media Post Generator | The Marketing Specialists
metaDescription: Generate social media post ideas and supporting image prompts with a tool-first page layout designed for marketing use.
heroText: Create social media post ideas faster with a clean tool-first layout designed to support visibility, consistency, and content planning.
toolIntro: This is the tool layout for Cloudflare Pages. Later, this section can be replaced with your real embedded app or AI-powered generator interface.

supportItems.title: Faster content planning
supportItems.text: Use the tool to reduce the time it takes to create platform-ready post ideas.

supportItems.title: Better consistency
supportItems.text: A tool like this helps brands publish more regularly without starting from scratch every time.

supportItems.title: Useful for strategy
supportItems.text: It can support brainstorming, campaign planning, and content repurposing.

ctaPanel.headline: Ready to Elevate Your Social Media Strategy?
ctaPanel.text: Use a smarter social media marketing and advice service to complement your content workflow.

faqs.question: Can this tool help with content ideas?
faqs.answer: Yes. This type of tool is designed to help generate ideas faster and make content planning easier.

faqs.question: Can tools like this support marketing strategy?
faqs.answer: Yes. A good content tool can support planning, consistency, testing, and faster execution.

faqs.question: Will this later connect to AI generation?
faqs.answer: Yes. The goal is to connect this page type to a smarter AI-powered content workflow later.
